rationale.R1.4: Mentions one prior work (agent-based V2G simulators) and contrasts FleetMind by highlighting heterogeneous willingness-to-discharge and per-agent utility tradeoff.
rationale.R1.7: No specific citations are flagged, but the text assumes familiarity with existing V2G research and relevant datasets.
rationale.RX.1: All claims presented as equally confident without acknowledging any uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the topics mentioned in the prompt (FleetMind's features, instantiation, and contributions).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are not traced; minor edits like tightening prose are not annotated.
